push.heading: Push notifications
push.enabledHint: You'll receive push notifications in your browser.
push.blockedHint: To re-enable, click the lock icon in your browser's address bar, find the Notifications setting, and change it to Allow.
push.notEnabledHint: Enable to receive notifications even when the app is not open.

prefs.heading: Notification preferences
prefs.signupsHint: When a session you signed up for changes
prefs.assignmentHint: When you are assigned to a session
